evals.prompt: Confirm my frontend is actually deployed: localhost works on 3000 and public domain should return homepage.
evals.expected_output: Returns gate-by-gate PASS/FAIL with status code evidence and explicit overall verdict.

evals.prompt: After Docker changes, verify if this is genuinely fixed or still broken. I need proof, not guesses.
evals.expected_output: Runs mandatory gates, includes command evidence and identifies precise failing gate if any.

evals.prompt: Use browser-level validation only if needed, but do not block on optional tools.
evals.expected_output: Keeps optional Playwright/Firecrawl checks non-blocking and still delivers deterministic verdict.
